steps.title: Identify the doubling time parameter
steps.content: In $f(t)=24{,}000(2)^{t/360}$, the population doubles when the exponent equals $1$, i.e. when $t/360=1$.

steps.title: Apply to interpret the doubling time
steps.content: That gives $t=360$ minutes. That is the correct answer.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches 360. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
